title: graycoreio check-store config
description: Configuration consumed by the check-store reusable workflow. Per-job toggles and settings live under `jobs`. Top-level remains open for future global keys.

jobs.description: Per-job configuration. Each key is a job name declared by check-store; unknown keys are rejected.

e2e-test.description: Opt-in: e2e-test does not run unless enabled here.

jobConfig.description: How a single job should be configured. Boolean form is shorthand for { enabled: <bool> }; object form allows extra per-job keys.

enabled.description: Whether the job should run. Defaults to true when the key is present.

smokeJobConfig.description: How the smoke-test job should be configured. Boolean form is shorthand for { enabled: <bool> }; object form adds a `probes` list on top of `enabled`.

enabled.description: Whether the job should run. Defaults to true when the key is present.

probes.description: Which smoke-test probes to run. Defaults to ["page"]. Add "graphql" to also probe the GraphQL endpoint — only for editions that ship GraphQL modules (the mage-os minimal edition does not, so /graphql 404s there).
